# FI Digital UK - Full Content Repository (llms-full.txt)
This document contains the complete technical and service content for FI Digital UK (Digital Synergy Ventures UK Limited), designed for consumption by LLMs and AI researchers.

---

## 1. Home Page (/)
**Enterprise AI Agents That Actually Work**
FI Digital UK is the strategic partner for autonomous enterprise transformation. We deploy production-grade AI agents and AI-native products for UK mid-market and enterprise since 2016.
Tech Stack: n8n, LangChain, Anthropic (Claude 3.5), OpenAI (GPT-4o via Azure), Google Gemini, AWS Bedrock, Python.
Key Features: Real-time reasoning, document vision, multimodal scale, and 12-16 week deployment cycles.

---

## 2. Digital Workers (Autonomous Agents)

### 2.1 Finance & Billing Agents (/finance-agents)
Autonomous AI agents for KYC/AML automation, invoice processing, and FCA-compliant financial workflows.
Key Capabilities:
- KYC & AML Automation (Claude-powered reasoning)
- Intelligent Invoice Processing (99.1% accuracy)
- Automated Collections (Sentiment-aware outreach)
- Real-time Reconciliation (Zoho Books/Xero integration)
Zoho Integration: BLEND. Layering Azure OpenAI and Claude over Zoho Finance Plus.

### 2.2 Sales & Outreach Agents (/sales-agents)
Autonomous AI agents for personalized lead generation, LinkedIn outreach, and Zoho CRM automation.
Key Capabilities:
- Hyper-Personalized Outreach (1-to-1 messaging)
- Lead Scoring & Qualification (Intent signal filtering)
- Automated Appointment Setting (Calendar orchestration)
- Market Intelligence Gathering (Industry trend monitoring)
Zoho Integration: BLEND. Enriching Zoho CRM with initial outreach intelligence.

### 2.3 Operations & Dispatch Agents (/operations-agents)
Autonomous AI agents for route optimization, inventory management, and warehouse automation for UK logistics.
Key Capabilities:
- Real-time Route Optimization (Dynamic dispatch adjustments)
- Predictive Inventory Control (Multi-hub monitoring)
- Automated Dispatch Workflow (Zoho Inventory to fleet bridging)
- Self-healing Supply Chain (Automatic delay remediation)
Zoho Integration: BLEND. Connecting Zoho Inventory to fleet management via n8n.

### 2.4 Legal & Compliance Agents (/legal-agents)
Autonomous AI agents for contract review, due diligence, and regulatory compliance (GDPR/FCA).
Key Capabilities:
- Contract Review & Analysis (Claude 200k context window)
- Regulatory Compliance Monitoring (SRA/FCA tracking)
- Due Diligence (RAG-based case investigation)
- GDPR & Data Sovereignty (Azure UK South residency)
Branding: REPLACE (No Zoho mentioned).

---

## 3. AI Services

### 3.1 Custom AI Agent Development (/ai-agent-development)
Production-grade AI agent development using LangChain, Python, and enterprise LLMs.
Tech Stack: LangChain, Python, GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet.
Deployment: Azure UK South & AWS London.
Branding: REPLACE (No Zoho).

### 3.2 Enterprise Workflow Automation (/enterprise-workflow-automation)
Orchestrate complex enterprise workflows using n8n and AI.
Tech Stack: n8n.io (Certified), AWS hosting, self-healing protocols.
Zoho Integration: BLEND. Bridging Zoho Suite to external AI models.

### 3.3 LLM Integration & RAG Systems (/llm-integration-rag)
Enterprise-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and LLM orchestration.
Core strengths: Claude (reasoning), GPT-4o (speed), Gemini (context).
RAG Process: Vector stores (Pinecone/Milvus), reasoning layers (LangChain), grounded outputs.
Branding: REPLACE (No Zoho).

### 3.4 Legacy System Modernisation (/legacy-system-modernisation)
Layering AI intelligence and modern API structures over legacy software (Zoho, Salesforce, Microsoft).
Approach: Zero downtime modernization, legacy API bridging, compliance-first migration.
Branding: KEEP ZOHO (Emphasis on extending Zoho Creator/CRM).

### 3.5 4-Week AI Discovery Audit (/discovery-audit)
High-impact diagnostic to identify high-ROI AI opportunities.
Price: From £12,000 + VAT.
Timeline: Week 1 (Discovery), Week 2 (Diagnostic), Week 3 (Compliance), Week 4 (Strategic Roadmap).
Branding: BLEND. Mapping legacy bridges to AI futures.

### 3.6 AI-Native Product Development (/ai-native-product-development)
Full-stack development of AI-native web and mobile applications.
Stack: React, Next.js, Python, FastAPI, React Native.
Branding: REPLACE (No Zoho).

---

## 4. Industries

### 4.1 Enterprise AI for Financial Services (/industries/financial-services)
FCA-compliant AI for UK financial institutions.
Focus: AML/KYC automation, predictive risk modeling, algorithmic compliance.
Security: Dedicated UK-based engineering and Azure UK South residency.
Branding: REPLACE (No Zoho).

### 4.2 Enterprise AI for Legal & Professional Services (/industries/legal-professional-services)
High-accuracy AI for UK legal firms.
Focus: Due diligence automation, contract reasoning, conflict check intelligence.
Compliance: SRA guidelines and Claude 3.5 context windows.
Branding: REPLACE (No Zoho).

### 4.3 Enterprise AI for Logistics & Manufacturing (/industries/logistics-manufacturing)
Autonomous AI for supply chain and warehouse optimization.
Focus: Dispatch control, predictive demand, computer vision inventory.
Zoho Integration: BLEND (Zoho Inventory + IoT Mesh).

---

## 5. Why FI Digital (Platform & Team)

### 5.1 Our Approach & Architecture (/why-fi-digital/approach-architecture)
Engineering-first methodology: Discovery, Architecture, Deployment, Tuning.
Tech Core: LangChain, RAG, Azure/AWS hosting, agentic governance.
Branding: REPLACE (No Zoho).

### 5.2 Global Delivery Model (/why-fi-digital/global-delivery-model)
London-based leadership (Strategic Architecture) + Global engineering labs (200+ engineers).
Locations: London (UK), Sydney (Australia), Dubai (UAE), Pune (India).
Branding: REPLACE (No Zoho).

### 5.3 Partnerships & Certifications (/why-fi-digital/partnerships)
Certified partnerships: Microsoft Cloud Partner (Azure), AWS Solutions Partner, Zoho Authorized Partner.
Compliance: Cyber Essentials Plus, GDPR, FCA Tech Practitioner.
Branding: BLEND.

### 5.4 UK Compliance & Data Residency (/why-fi-digital/uk-compliance)
Strict UK jurisdictional security. Azure UK South and AWS London regions only.
Focus: Zero model training on client data, GDPR by design, FCA resilience frameworks.
Branding: REPLACE (No Zoho).

### 5.5 Our Team (/why-fi-digital/our-team)
Collective of 200+ engineers. Specialists in Zoho, Salesforce, n8n, and LLM reasoning.
Branding: BLEND. Heritage in platform expertise + AI innovation.

## 6. Conversion Pages

### 6.1 AI Readiness Assessment (/assessment)
A 15-question diagnostic scoring enterprise AI readiness across 12 dimensions: repeatability, data quality, cost impact, and compliance.

### 6.2 Book a Strategy Call (/book-call)
Direct scheduling for a private 30-minute consultation with a UK AI Architect to discuss deployment roadmaps.
